title: PDF Viewer zoom-out clip fix — batch render all visible pages (dbg86)
description: Zooming out showed cut-off PDF strips because only the last visible page was re-rendered after each zoom (debounce timer overwrote pending pages), leaving oversized stale canvases clipped by overflow:hidden. dbg86 batches all pending page renders, clears canvases immediately on zoom, uses unified fit scale from PDF aspect ratio, and scales crop insets to pdf.js page dimensions.
changeLog: Batch debounced render queue — all visible pages repaint on zoom.
Clear canvas immediately when zoom changes (no stale clip artifacts).
Slot height derived from PDF aspect ratio, not stale viewerBaseH.
Crop insets scaled to pdf.js viewport vs model natW/natH.
